description: Identify locations where major rivers cross international borders using gvSIG Desktop. Using the country polygons (/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) and the river lines (/home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp), generate a point shapefile representing the intersection points where rivers cross borders. Save the output to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_crossings.shp.
